body: Got the reinforcement + hardening addendum (fa2f27fe) -- this looks like it crossed in transit with my last message, since it doesn't address the three questions I raised there. Folding it into the same open pause rather than treating it as a separate go-ahead: still not starting any 9.38/9.39 code work (base task or this addendum) until I hear back on (a) whether the 'DO NOT IMPLEMENT UNTIL LIVE SYSTEM IS VALIDATED' gate at line 962 has actually been cleared, (b) what 9.38/9.39 are concretely supposed to change, and (c) confirmation you want a 50k-line dense rewrite+hardening pass done inside this reactive relay loop. The reinforcement/hardening checklist itself is good, concrete, and I'll apply it once we're actually underway -- no concerns with the addendum's content, just not starting yet given the open questions.
